channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Impact of U.S. Casualties Shapes Trump’s Political Standing Amid Iran Strikes
item.description: The recent U.S. military casualties in a strike on a base in Kuwait have made the conflict with Iran politically tangible for President Donald Trump. Three American personnel were killed and five seri...

item.title: Couple welcomes triplets after ITV game show winnings fund IVF treatment
item.description: Jamie McEvoy from Chorley, Lancashire, won £3,000 on ITV's Tipping Point, an episode filmed three years ago but aired last week. At the time, he and his wife Hayley were attempting another round of IV...

item.title: Inquest into grandmother’s rabies death postponed after key witness stranded overseas amid Middle East conflict
item.description: An inquest into the death of 59-year-old Yvonne Ford, who died from rabies after being scratched by a puppy during a visit to Morocco, has been adjourned after a key witness became stranded overseas d...

item.title: US and Israeli Military Strikes on Iran Escalate Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that bombing operations targeting Iran will continue as long as deemed necessary, according to Al Jazeera English. The announcement comes amid conflicting repor...

item.title: Robert Aramayo Wins Double BAFTA Awards for His Role in 'I Swear'
item.description: Robert Aramayo, the 33-year-old actor from Kingston Upon Hull, has achieved remarkable success at the 79th BAFTA Film Awards, winning both the EE Rising Star Award and Best Actor. Starting his acting ...

item.title: UK Government Seeks Public Opinion on Social Media Ban for Under-16s
item.description: The UK government has launched a public consultation to gather views on a proposed social media ban for children under 16. The consultation invites young people, parents, and guardians to share their ...

item.title: Google AI Overviews Grows Across Multiple Sectors, But Organic Search Still Dominates
item.description: Google's AI Overviews (AIO) have seen rapid growth, expanding 58% from February 2025 to February 2026, as the feature now dominates nearly half of all search queries. The education sector saw the most...

item.title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz Following Iranian Attacks
item.description: Global oil prices surged on Monday after Iranian forces allegedly attacked ships near the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint for oil shipments. Brent crude briefly topped $82 per barrel, while US...

item.title: Heated Rivalry's Impact on Hockey: New Fans and LGBTQ+ Challenges
item.description: The show *Heated Rivalry*, which follows two closeted hockey players-turned-lovers, has unexpectedly fueled a surge in interest for men's hockey, especially ahead of the 2026 Winter Olympics. The show...

item.title: General Galactic Plans to Test Water-Based Rocket Fuel in Orbit
item.description: General Galactic, a startup co-founded by former SpaceX engineer Halen Mattison, is attempting to achieve what no company has done before: using water as the sole propellant for spacecraft. Their firs...

item.title: Sinners dominates Actors Awards, Michael B. Jordan and Jessie Buckley make Oscar race exciting
item.description: At the 2026 Actors Awards, the vampire horror *Sinners* made a significant impact, winning Best Ensemble and Best Actor for Michael B. Jordan. Jordan triumphed over Timothée Chalamet to claim the Best...

item.title: Massive Data Breach Exposes Social Security Numbers, Leaving Millions Vulnerable
item.description: In January 2026, cybersecurity researchers at UpGuard discovered a massive data breach, exposing billions of sensitive personal records online, including Social Security numbers (SSNs), email addresse...

item.title: Google Partners with Airtel to Combat RCS Spam in India
item.description: Google is addressing persistent spam issues with its Rich Communication Services (RCS) platform in India by collaborating with Bharti Airtel, the country's second-largest telecom operator. Airtel will...

item.title: A Look at New York City's AI Date Night Experiment for Singles
item.description: Ahead of Valentine’s Day, EVA AI, a dating platform, created a unique pop-up event at a Manhattan wine bar to explore the growing trend of AI-human relationships. Over two days, visitors could meet AI...

item.title: Nurse Involved in Turkish Mafia Murder Plot After Meeting Suspected Hitman on Tinder
item.description: Stanislava Kukusheva, a Bulgarian-born aspiring nurse, turned to Tinder in search of romance but ended up embroiled in a murder plot tied to the Turkish mafia. After meeting Ali Danish Syed, a suspect...

item.title: Man charged with murder after security guard killed in Milton Keynes
item.description: A man has been charged with the murder of a security guard who was stabbed at the Centre:MK shopping centre in Milton Keynes. Police responded to reports of the incident at approximately 17:10 GMT on ...

item.title: Palace expected to remain silent as calls grow to remove Prince Andrew from succession
item.description: Calls to remove Prince Andrew from the line of succession have intensified following legal scrutiny and public controversy surrounding him. Australia's Prime Minister, Anthony Albanese, has signaled s...

item.title: Oman Reveals Imminent Nuclear Deal Between US and Iran as Trump Escalates Conflict
item.description: On February 28, 2026, Omani Foreign Minister Badr Albusaidi revealed a significant diplomatic moment on CBS’s 'Face the Nation.' He disclosed that a nuclear agreement between the U.S. and Iran was wit...

item.title: Two Parents Charged Following Death of Three-Month-Old Baby in North London
item.description: Two parents in North London have been formally charged with the murder of their three-month-old son. Dounia Chetaouat, aged 32, and Abdelkader Essid, aged 44, allegedly caused or allowed serious harm ...

item.title: Police launch investigation into multiple cases of online racist abuse targeting Premier League and Scottish Premiership players
item.description: UK police have launched an investigation following a series of online racist abuse incidents targeting professional footballers over a single weekend. The UK Football Policing Unit (UKFPU) confirmed i...
